name: Fluid Power Cylinder and Actuator Manufacturing
rationale: Existing ZOLLERN market. Cold-drawn precision round bar and shaped profiles for piston rod blanks, cylinder barrel tube blanks, and end-cap blanks. Market size USD 16.2B global (2025). Key buyers: Caterpillar, Liebherr, Bosch Rexroth, Parker Hannifin.
entryStrategy: Existing market — differentiate via in-line IH coupled with alloy grade (42CrMo4 guaranteed >=54 HRC), IT8 OD tolerance, and EN 10204 3.1 standard delivery.
